remarks: Welcome to River View Terrace...desirable well maintained association in a highly convenient location right on the Stamford/Darien border. This ground floor 2BD condo is an excellent choice for anyone who enjoys easy private and secure access to their home but also seeks the convenience of one car garage, an oversized storage and a beautiful seasonal in ground pool in a nice serene location to enjoy the hot summer days. This is a fully updated unit with a beautiful open floor plan and a luxurious feel. Both bedrooms are spacious and provide excellent closet space. The laundry is in the unit and the washer is new. Beautiful open chef's kitchen with generous size cabinets, quartz countertops, deep farmer's sink and all SS appliances including new refrigerator allows for easy entertaining both indoor and on the lovely recently redone deck right off the living room. In the winter enjoy the cozy wood burning fireplace. Hardwood floors throughout, ceiling fans and beautiful new light fixtures among most recent upgrades. Additional closet space in the hallway w/nice shelving system is just yet another proof of no detail spared to make this unit sparkle. Parking space #3 in addition to garage parking space plus visitor parking spots. Minutes to beaches, walk to Metro North, easy access to Downtown Stamford's shops and restaurants as well as I-95. This unit truly has it all; can also be sold with most furnishing for anyone who enjoys the style. Come and see it all for yourself.
